title: NDA, Opposition spar in LS over efforts to free country of Maoism
description: While Shiv Sena pointed out that the red corridor has shrunk significantly due to the policies of the NDA govt and the previous UPA regime was helpless, the Congress hit back saying it was the UPA that launched Operation Green Hunt and had created the Commando Battalion for Resolute Action (CoBRA) to deal with Maoist threat; Union Home Minister Amit Shah had announced that Maoist menace would be completely eliminated by March 31, 2026
